backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend for a file/note/folder/mission management app, including blob storage, access control, upload tracking, and CRUD operations for files, notes, folders, and missions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including adding a 4th 'Collections' dock item to OrbitDock at 90° intervals, designing its SVG icon, and creating the CollectionsFullScreenView component.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key behaviors of each component, hook, page, and utility in the React frontend.
frontend/DRAFT_BASELINE_V114.md: Documents the creation of a Draft baseline synced 1:1 with Live version 114 (February 3, 2026), validating parity across authentication, actor initialization, UI/UX, and styling.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point for the MYL PWA, configuring viewport, icons, manifest, and service worker registration with update handling.
frontend/PAUSE_AFTER_RESTORE.md: Change control notice freezing all frontend modifications after the Live v114 restoration, listing prohibited actions and requiring explicit user approval before any further changes.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for the MYL app, defining app name, icons, theme color, display mode, and categories for installability.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker for the MYL PWA implementing install/activate lifecycle, bounded runtime caching, and network-first fetch strategy with offline fallback.
frontend/PWA_INSTALLABILITY_NOTES.md: Checklist and troubleshooting guide for verifying Chrome PWA installability criteria for the MYL app on Android, covering manifest, service worker, icons, and installation steps.
frontend/RESTORE_LIVE_V114_CHECKLIST.md: A checklist documenting the restoration of the frontend to Live version 114, verifying all core files, authentication flow, UI components, and behavior match the v114 baseline.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wires together ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, ActorProvider, and UploadProvider, and conditionally renders the IntroScreen on app resume after login.
frontend/src/components/ActorInitErrorSt: Error state UI component displayed when actor initialization fails, showing a classified error message with collapsible technical details and retry/sign-out actions.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedGalleryI: Renders an SVG crosshair/target icon with concentric rings, crosshair lines, and corner markers that animate on hover using Tailwind classes.
frontend/src/components/CircularBottomNa: A fixed bottom navigation bar with three items (Upload, Mission, Files) arranged in a circular carousel that supports swipe gestures and reduced motion preferences.
frontend/src/components/CollectionsFullS: Full-screen view displaying a grid of file and note thumbnails with long-press selection mode, bulk actions (move, delete, share), and support for image, link, and note item types.
frontend/src/components/DecorativeBottom: Renders a fixed, thin horizontal decorative border line near the bottom of the screen.
frontend/src/components/ExternalOpenFall: Dialog shown when a browser blocks opening a file in a new window, offering retry and download options.
frontend/src/components/FilePreviewDialo: Dialog that previews a file (image, video, PDF, Office, or unsupported) and provides actions for downloading, opening externally, moving to a folder/mission, and deleting.
frontend/src/components/FileUploadSectio: Handles file uploads, link creation, and note creation via a menu with dialogs, tracking upload progress through the UploadContext and displaying toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/FloatingFileStac: A memoized floating UI component that displays a stacked card widget of recently uploaded files in the bottom-right corner, with animated transitions and a badge showing the total file count.
frontend/src/components/FoldersButton.ts: A fixed-position button component rendered at the bottom-left of the screen that opens the folders view, supporting disabled, pulse animation, and overlay z-index states.
frontend/src/components/FoldersDialog.ts: A deprecated dialog component for managing folders (create, rename, delete, select) that has been superseded by FoldersFullScreenView but is kept for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/components/FoldersFullScree: A full-screen view for managing folders with support for creating, renaming, deleting, and selecting folders, using swipe actions and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenViewer: A full-screen file viewer dialog supporting navigation between files via buttons, keyboard arrows, or touch swipes, with actions for download, delete, share, send to folder, and move to mission.
frontend/src/components/GallerySection.t: A gallery component that displays files and notes (in or out of a folder) as a grid of cards, supporting bulk selection via long-press, and actions like open, download, share, delete, and move.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with theme toggle (light/dark), animated gallery icon, and a sign-out dropdown menu shown only when the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/HomeSharedElemen: Renders a fixed overlay with a backdrop blur and an animated shared-element clone to animate opening/closing transitions between home sections (folders or missions).
frontend/src/components/IntroScreen.tsx: Full-screen splash overlay that displays the animated gallery icon and fades out over 2 seconds before calling an onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/LinkOpenFallback: Modal dialog shown when a browser blocks opening an external link, offering the user options to retry opening or copy the URL to the clipboard.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that triggers Internet Identity login, showing a spinner and disabled state while the login is in progress.
frontend/src/components/MissionDetailFul: Full-screen view for a single mission that displays and edits its title and task list with autosave, and shows attached files and notes with viewer dialogs.
frontend/src/components/MissionEditorDia: Dialog for creating a new mission with a title input and an inline task list editor that supports adding, toggling, and removing tasks before saving.
frontend/src/components/MissionsButton.t: Fixed-position button with a Target icon and optional pulse animation that opens the missions panel, supporting disabled and z-index overlay states.
frontend/src/components/MissionsFullScre: Full-screen view for listing, selecting, and deleting missions, with tabs for incomplete/completed missions and swipe-to-delete rows. Navigates to a mission detail view on selection and uses React Query mutations for delete operations.
frontend/src/components/MobileOnlyLayout: Simple layout wrapper that applies mobile-only CSS container classes around its children.
frontend/src/components/MoveToMissionDia: Dialog for moving selected files and/or notes into a chosen mission, listing available missions and triggering move mutations on selection.
frontend/src/components/NoteViewerDialog: Dialog that displays a note's content with actions to download, share, delete, send to folder, or send to mission.
frontend/src/components/OrbitDock.tsx: Animated circular dock navigation component with four items (Upload, Folders, Mission, Collections) arranged on an orbit, supporting swipe gestures and smooth rotation animations to switch the active item.
frontend/src/components/SendToFolderDial: Dialog for moving selected files and/or notes into a chosen folder or back to the main collection, using React Query mutations and performance diagnostics.
frontend/src/components/StackFilesFullSc: Full-screen view for managing stacked/selected files, supporting multi-select, delete, download, share, move-to-folder, move-to-mission, and inline file viewing via FullScreenViewer.
A swipeable row component that reveals Edit and Delete action buttons when the user swipes left, using pointer events and CSS transforms.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedProgressB: A fixed top progress bar that displays overall upload progress for active (non-completed) file, link, and note uploads from the UploadContext.
frontend/src/components/UploadQueueRunne: A headless component that restores and resumes pending uploads from a persisted queue on mount, processing them with a concurrency limiter and tracking progress via UploadContext.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeIntroScre: A welcome/landing screen with an animated target SVG logo and a login button, shown to unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/contexts/ActorContext.tsx: React context that manages the backend actor lifecycle (initialization, retry with exponential backoff, sign-out) based on the user's Internet Identity, exposing actor, status, error, and retry/signOut helpers.
frontend/src/contexts/UploadContext.tsx: React context that manages upload state for files, links, and notes, tracking progress, completion, and providing methods to start, update, complete, and restore uploads.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCircularCarousel.t: Hook that manages a circular carousel with up to three visible items, computing x/y/scale/opacity positions along a circular arc based on the current index.
frontend/src/hooks/useHomePrefetch.ts: Hook that prefetches folders, files, missions, and notes into the React Query cache once per authenticated session when the backend actor becomes ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntroOnAppResume.t: Hook that fires a callback when the app regains visibility or window focus, but only when the user is authenticated and Internet Identity initialization is complete.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCoarsePointer.ts: Hook that detects whether the device uses a coarse pointer (touch) via a CSS media query, returning a boolean that updates if the pointer type changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissionAutosave.ts: Hook that debounces and autosaves mission title and tasks to the backend, handling concurrent saves with a queue and resetting state on mission switches.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissionsQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on missions, including listing, fetching, creating, and updating missions with optimistic updates and targeted cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotesQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating notes, supporting root, folder, and mission-scoped queries with a concurrency limiter for note creation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for file and folder operations including paginated file fetching by scope (root, folder, mission) and folder creation with a concurrency limiter for uploads.
frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotion.ts: A hook that detects and reactively tracks the user's OS-level 'prefers-reduced-motion' accessibility setting.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechToText.ts: A hook wrapping the Web Speech API to provide continuous speech recognition with interim and final transcript callbacks, error handling, and browser support detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useStackedFiles.ts: A Zustand store hook managing a stack of selected FileMetadata objects with add, remove, and clear operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts: A hook that detects left and right pointer swipe gestures based on configurable distance and velocity thresholds, returning pointer event handlers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind directives, CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, notes, missions), and mobile layout utilities.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main home page component that orchestrates file uploads, gallery display, folders, missions, and collections views using an OrbitDock navigation bar and various full-screen overlays with shared element transitions.
frontend/src/utils/actorInitializationMe: Provides standardized error classification functions and user-facing messages for backend actor initialization states, including stopped canister, invalid admin token, and not-ready conditions.
frontend/src/utils/externalOpen.ts: Utility functions for opening URLs in new tabs, downloading files, downloading notes as text, and sharing files via the Web Share API, with popup-block detection via page visibility events.
frontend/src/utils/fileBytesWorkerSingle: Singleton class that manages a Web Worker for reading file bytes with a concurrency limit of 3, queuing excess requests and resolving them as workers become available.
frontend/src/utils/fileOpenRules.ts: Determines the appropriate open action (in-app viewer or direct download) for a file based on its MIME type category.
frontend/src/utils/filePreview.ts: Categorizes files by MIME type into image, video, PDF, office, or unsupported, and provides helpers for previewability checks and human-readable type labels.
frontend/src/utils/missionCompletion.ts: Utility functions to calculate mission progress percentage, determine if a mission is completed, and split a list of missions into incomplete and completed groups.
frontend/src/utils/missionTaskCompare.ts: Provides a BigInt-safe equality check for Task arrays by comparing taskId, task text, and completed status without using JSON.stringify.
frontend/src/utils/performanceDiagnostic: Opt-in performance diagnostics singleton that times operations and logs durations to the console, enabled via a localStorage flag or URL parameter.
Implements an IndexedDB-backed upload queue that persists file upload state (bytes, progress, completion) across sessions, with a 50MB per-file size limit and methods to enqueue, update progress, and mark items completed.
frontend/src/utils/reactQueryDiagnostics: Development-only helper that logs React Query mutation lifecycle phases (start, success, error, settled) with timestamps to the console.
frontend/src/utils/smokeTestCoreFlows.ts: Development utility that runs smoke tests against the backend actor for core flows (folder, mission, link, and note creation) and returns structured pass/fail results with a formatted summary string.
frontend/src/utils/uploadConcurrency.ts: Provides two concurrency limiter factories — a basic one and a cancellable one — that queue async tasks and execute them up to a configurable parallel limit.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/src/workers/fileBytes.worker.ts: Web Worker that reads a File object into a Uint8Array off the main thread and posts the bytes back via transferable buffer, reporting errors in the response if reading fails.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode support, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (including sidebar, notes, and missions palettes), CSS variable-driven border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and the tailwindcss-animate and typography plugins.
frontend/V114_BASELINE_FRONTEND_FILES.tx: A canonical list of all frontend source files that define the v114 baseline, used for validating 1:1 Draft sync and detecting drift.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the current build version, architectural notes for the Adaptive Orbit Dock with a 4th Collections item, and a list of existing implemented features with their requirement IDs and versions.
